Wait, looking at the output: there's only ONE G object at (19, 24) with 20 pixels. Cross 1 doesn't have a G object anymore. So the G border moved from cross 1 to cross 2.
The g marks are now at (18,12), (19,11), (19,14), (21,12) - forming a cross around (19, 12). This is to the LEFT of cross 1.
Hmm, so the pattern seems to be:
